evidence_summary: The scene focuses on the tactical execution of a combined-arms land campaign. It requires high-scale coordination between Thark and Heliumite forces to demonstrate coalition strength through a decisive assault on Zodangan positions. Visual emphasis must be...

Carter stays with Tars Tarkas to lead the land campaign. After unloading Thark mounts, the combined Thark and Heliumite forces launch a decisive assault on the remaining Zodangan land camps, crushing the resistance despite being outnumbered.
